message:
🐛 Fix mermaid theme: use CSS filter for dark mode instead of mermaid.initialize() (#1284)

mermaid.initialize() caches the theme from the first call and ignores
subsequent calls, making runtime theme switching impossible. Fix by
always rendering with the default (light) theme and using Tailwind
dark:invert dark:hue-rotate-180 CSS classes to adapt for dark mode.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
